Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Income Tax Act (small brewery tax credit)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Income Tax Act (small brewery tax credit)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Income Tax Act to provide a tax credit for taxpayers who brewed, in Canada, less than 15芒聙聣001 hectolitres of beer and malt liquor in a fiscal year.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: This Act may be cited as the Supporting Small Brewers Act.
The Income Tax Act is amended by adding the following after section 127.3:

There may be deducted from the tax otherwise payable under this Part for a taxation year by a taxpayer who is a licensed brewer under Part III of the Excise Act and who brewed, in Canada, in that fiscal year, less than 15芒聙聣001 hectolitres of beer and malt liquor,

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: in the case of a brewer who brewed 5芒聙聣000 hectolitres of beer and malt liquor or less, an amount determined by the formula

Formula.FormulaText: A 脙聴 (0.1 脙聴 B)

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the quantity, in hectolitres, of beer and malt liquor brewed in that fiscal year, and
is the duty of excise set out in section 1 of Part II of the schedule to the Excise Act; or

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: in the case of a brewer who brewed more than 5芒聙聣000 hectolitres of beer and malt liquor but less than 15芒聙聣001 hectolitres of beer and malt liquor, an amount determined by the formula

Formula.FormulaText: 0.1 脙聴 [1 - (A - 5芒聙聣000)/10芒聙聣000] 脙聴 B 脙聴 A

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the quantity, in hectolitres, of beer and malt liquor brewed in that fiscal year, and
is the duty of excise set out in section 1 of Part II of the schedule to the Excise Act.
